---
title: "World congress 2026 of the International Microsimulation Association"
author: "admin"
date: "2026-07-02"
categories: ["Beamm"]
tags: ["Beamm","Microsimulation"]
---

On Thursday 2 July 2026, I will be presenting my research at the 2026 World Congress of the International Microsimulation Association. My presentation is entitled: 
BEAMM project: How do we deal with data? Statistical matching and WGAN generation.
